description: Style NoteThis Summer beat the heat and chill out at home with these knitted pants from hanes. The luxurious cotton fabric not only retains its shape even after repeated washes, but also offers superior comfort. And with the ComfortSoft fabric covering the elasticated waistband, be assured of a pinch-free comfortable Fit, while you can further customise the fitting with the drawstring. Wear this with sporty or casual T-shirts and revel in a comfortable lifestyle.Product DetailsFull length grey knit pants, two slit pockets at side-seam, red, black and white panels with grey piping at side seam,  brand badge on left side seam, elasticized waistband with drawstringMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like coloursLow ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size L
